solverNotes: Solved B=M_psi^-1/2 K M_psi^-1/2, then returned psi=M_psi^-1/2 u with M_psi normalization.
Residuals are ||K psi - lambda M_psi psi||_2 / ||psi||_Mpsi in the original stiffness variables.
Dense Hermitian Jacobi reference path is bounded to totalDof <= 512; it is intended for current explicit matrices, not production-scale spectra.

Solved the persisted Euclidean-Hermitian stiffness/action matrix K directly with M_psi=I.
Residuals are ||K psi - lambda M_psi psi||_2 / ||psi||_Mpsi in the original stiffness variables.
Dense Hermitian Jacobi reference path is bounded to totalDof <= 512; it is intended for current explicit matrices, not production-scale spectra.
